name: Year-End Inventory Reconciliation with Quarterly Report
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) must prepare its year-end Tier II submission by reconciling chemical inventory data with the facility manager's quarterly usage report. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. A reconciliation memo from the Operations Manager has been placed on the facility workstation with updated chemical quantities and infrastructure changes. Review the memo carefully and update ALL chemical inventory quantities to match the reconciled figures. Additionally, the memo describes a new secondary storage location that must be added, and updated facility occupancy data. Update the certification for the 2025 reporting year with certifier 'James Okafor, Environmental Compliance Manager' and date signed '2025-02-01'. After reconciling all data, save and export the final submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\reconciled_submission.t2s.
